spec_match.rationale: All three concepts exercise the exact spec surfaces — the [SecureContext, IsolatedContext] binding + sub-apps policy gate (capability-gate), add()'s SubAppsAddResponse installedApps/failedApps records with per-path validation (install-response-map), and the ManifestId round trip across list()/remove() (identity-roundtrip) — with copy now matching the current WICG draft signatures and the official sample's documented setup.

interactive.rationale: Real controls drive real behaviour: the four-part prerequisite probe, the install batch builder with per-path TypeError validation, and list()/remove() with a clearly-labelled illustrative fallback when the IWA-only binding is absent — never a faked result.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index lede and enabling-it section now match what the concepts deliver and the sources say: developer trial in 150; the chromestatus API (updated 2026-07-24 12:57 UTC) and the v152 milestone listing agree on desktop 152 as the default-on target; status text 'Proposed'.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers the honest negative branches: unbound ordinary-https origin (probe FAIL rows), unrecognised sub-apps policy token, slash-less install path (TypeError), unsupported-context payload echo, and illustrative-vs-live labelling throughout.

references.rationale: All four pages cite https://chromestatus.com/feature/6260680824061952. The feature index also links the WICG spec, the WICG explainer, and the official sample; each concept links the spec surface it teaches (capability-gate: the WICG spec; install-response-map and identity-roundtrip: the relevant explainer anchors) and — added this revision for source traceability — every concept's See also now also links the official sample demo/setup README (https://github.com/vkrot-cell/subapps-demo), which their requirement notes paraphrase.

conformance.rationale: New immutable feature suite (this iteration, 7 assertions): window.subApps binding, add/remove/list member types, the [SecureContext] gate, list()'s record shape, and add()'s TypeError batch validation — executed live at /v150/sub-apps/conformance/: 1 pass / 6 fail on an ordinary https origin (the honest result for an IWA-only API), no stale milestones encoded.

runtime_evidence.rationale: chrome-devtools-mcp on Chrome stable (2026-07-24): every visible control exercised at 1280×800 and 390×844 — probe verdict + 4 gate rows; add() validation branch, unsupported branch with exact payload, reset; list() illustrative inventory, label-tap checkbox toggle, illustrative remove with row removal; zero console errors and zero failed requests on all pages.

telemetry_health.rationale: Each concept emits showcaseTelemetry.assert events for its branches (gate available/unavailable, add path-validation/unsupported/resolved/rejected, list/remove live/rejected/illustrative); telemetry POSTs observed returning 202 during validation.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables throughout, button background+color pairs set together, focus-visible outlines, no static-code-card pattern; targeted overflow-wrap/table-layout fixes keep results inside the viewport at 390px.

accessibility.rationale: role=status/aria-live=polite on every result region (observed updating in the a11y tree), semantic tables with captions, keyboard-operable controls with visible focus; checkboxes enlarged to 24×24 (WCAG 2.2 AA minimum) and ManifestId/appName cells wrapped in labels so row-level tapping toggles selection.

mobile_desktop_parity.rationale: Matrix pass after two in-place fixes found by this iteration: capability-gate's results table overflowed 390px (466px) — fixed with overflow-wrap + fixed layout (now 306px, scrollW=390); identity-roundtrip's remove() message overflowed via an unbroken payload token and checkboxes were 13×13 — fixed with overflow-wrap:anywhere, 24px checkboxes, and label-wrapped cells. All four pages: scrollWidth=390 on mobile, no overflow at 1280.

openQuestions.title: Re-verify default-on copy when the feature's status text moves off 'Proposed'
openQuestions.detail: All availability copy is provenanced to the direct chromestatus API as updated 2026-07-24 12:57 UTC (desktop 152, status 'Proposed', active stage intent_ship/Prepare-to-ship desktop_first 152, agreeing with the v152 milestone listing). A rendered chromestatus page served a stale 153 figure earlier in July — re-fetch the API (not the rendered page) on future passes and update all four pages if the estimate or status moves.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible live region announcements for dynamic probe/status results after button activation
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use role=status/aria-live on result regions, semantic tables with caption + th scope, and descriptive labels for controls so assistive tech perceives dynamic state.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Verified applied on all three concepts (live regions observed updating in the a11y tree; captioned tables); extended identity-roundtrip with 24px checkboxes and label-wrapped ManifestId/appName cells for adequate tap targets.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: chrome-devtools-mcp a11y-tree snapshots and control exercises at 1280×800 and 390×844, 2026-07-24

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive data tables with long identifiers on narrow mobile without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Let long unbreakable tokens wrap (overflow-wrap) and give tables a deterministic track layout instead of spilling past the viewport.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Applied in place: capability-gate table gained overflow-wrap:anywhere + table-layout:fixed with a narrow status column (466px → 306px at 390px viewport); identity-roundtrip result output gained overflow-wrap:anywhere so unbroken payload strings wrap.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: document.documentElement.scrollWidth = 390 after every interactive state on both concepts (was 508 on capability-gate before the fix)

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible live region announcements for dynamic probe/status results after button activation
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Synchronise programmatic accessibility state with the visual state at the moment of user interaction (aria-live announcements tied to the activating control).
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Applied as designed by the existing pages: every control's result is announced via the same activation (button → aria-live output); install-response-map's path validation announces the TypeError warning through the same output region rather than a silent visual-only state.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: chrome-devtools-mcp snapshot shows status nodes with live=polite on all three concepts

summary: Feature-family iteration: corrected stale availability/setup copy on all four pages (ChromeStatus API updated 2026-07-24 12:57 UTC — desktop 152, status 'Proposed', agreeing with the v152 Enabled-by-default listing; documented ChromeOS + three-flag + chrome://web-app-internals setup per the official sample, with --enable-blink-features=SubApps demoted to a labelled debug note), created the feature's missing immutable conformance suite (7 assertions, executes live: 1 pass / 6 fail on an ordinary https origin — the honest IWA-gated result), and fixed two mobile-parity defects found during validation (table overflow on capability-gate, tap-target/overflow on identity-roundtrip). All controls exercised at desktop and 390px mobile via chrome-devtools-mcp with zero console errors and zero failed requests.
